person.bio: As a DevOps Engineer, my journey in Cloud Native technology feels like operating a spaceship. With Kubernetes as the control center, I enjoy navigating complex systems, automating everyday missions, and keeping everything running smoothly in orbit. I also design and operate GPU-powered Kubernetes clusters to support demanding AI workloads. Each challenge opens up new galaxies of ideas, tools, and possibilities. There is still so much to explore, and I’m excited to continue this journey.

person.name: Daniel Mccracken
person.bio: I am a DevOps and business professional with over two decades of experience spanning enterprise healthcare IT, application development, CI/CD, and Kubernetes administration. I helped found the Google Developers Group of Grand Rapids, MI, which sparked my interest in containerization and orchestration at scale. In 2019, I left the corporate world to help start DevsOperative, Inc. with my friends. They introduced me to Kubernetes around the time of the Kubernetes 1.0 launch, which inspired me to learn and invest in this amazing platform and community. My favorite tools are Helm, ArgoCD, and Cert Manager. Reach out to me on LinkedIn and checkout our stream on Twitch or YouTube called the Cloud Native Coffee Hour!

Beyond the technical, I am driven by a desire to share knowledge, contribute to the community, and stay at the cutting edge of innovation.

person.name: Avinash Sharma

My mission is to turn infrastructure into a competitive advantage—driven by automation, resilience, and innovation.
